final_model.note: apparent_training_auc is optimistic and must not be used as validation performance. Use Nested CV / LOOCV / permutation.

nested_cv.debug_note: fold_details contains train/test patients, selected features, fold coefficients and patient-level predicted probabilities. Feature selection is performed inside each training fold.

validation_summary.note: These are validation metrics. The final model is trained on all available patients only after validation is complete.
